creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->analyzed


Feedback received, thanks! 

I have just upgraded french/aster to the latest stable version. 

Unfortunately, it's quiet difficult to build aster with some 
combinations of arch Ã compilers - even on 32 bits with Gcc. 

E.g. see http://www.code-aster.org/forum2/viewtopic.php?pid=40491#p40491 

It should be better with the new branches (testing), but I'm not ready 
to port it at the moment. 

Still doing some tests, but I'm afraid I'll have to mark it BROKEN for 
64 bits on -CURRENT. Your tests on ia64 are welcomed!
